title: xyris jupicai var. humilis
intro: Xyris jupicai var. humilis, also known as the Brazilian yellow-eyed grass, is a plant species in the family Xyridaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues and skin conditions. The roots and rhizomes of Xyris jupicai var. humilis contain anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds, providing various health benefits such as soothing sore throats, reducing fever, and promoting wound healing. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to alleviate cold and flu symptoms and to support the immune system.
